name: zeb/threejs-vrm
description: VRM 0.x/1.0 avatar viewer for RWE templates. Three.js + @pixiv/three-vrm bundled offline. Auto-mount, expression control, animation mixer, look-at, spring bones.

full-3.x.note: Three.js r0.171 + @pixiv/three-vrm 3.x via esbuild. Build: cd /tmp/zeb-threejs-vrm-build && npm install && node_modules/.bin/esbuild entry.mjs --bundle --format=esm --minify --outfile=threejs-vrm.bundle.mjs
